resources.string: Network Booster සහ DNS Switcher features වැඩ කරන්න local VPN tunnel එකක් අවශ්‍යයි. මේක ඔයාගේ data කිසිම remote server එකකට යවන්නේ නෑ - device එක ඇතුලේම (local) ක්‍රියා කරන tunnel එකක්.

NetUP uses this permission ONLY when you tap "Clean Now" - it briefly opens each background app\'s system Settings page and taps the real "Force stop" button on your behalf, then returns you to NetUP. It does not run in the background at any other time and does not read or interact with any other app.
